function.message: I can’t reliably return the project start date because this runtime requires preflight_schema/preflight_project before any read/search, but those preflight tools are not available in the exposed toolset. Please enable preflight tools so I can verify and return the exact DD-MM-YYYY date.
function.rulebook_notes: Server enforces PREFLIGHT_REQUIRED before read/search/write; unsupported-capability discipline requires reporting unsupported when required capability is unavailable.
